betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Not just subconscious lies, but betrayals as well. Not the misguided twisting of truth, its outright denial.
The imprisonment of the Queen of Bees, born of naivety, and of the actions of those willing to take advantage of it.
The crimes of the Twilight Horde and the Shyre Empire, unsurprisingly, will chase the universe long after their demise.
But from Truth, can come reparation.
The Bees who, despite having experienced a horrible betrayal, are willing to trust and help the people their vast civilization encounters.
The people of the Mythic Shells, having no choice other than do the will of their rulers, affirming their individuality, and being willing to seek forgiveness to those they hurt.
Because, thankfully, betrayal does not have to be followed by retaliation. Because mercy and forgiveness refuse to be trampled by betrayal.
